title: Kale Bloom — Proof of Farm
description: Groth16 zero-knowledge proof of your KALE farming tier. Proves tier membership without revealing your exact balance.
method: Poseidon(address_hash, balance, salt) → commitment, then Groth16 proof of tier >= threshold

outputs.proof: Groth16 proof (pi_a: G1, pi_b: G2, pi_c: G1)

verification: On-chain via Stellar Protocol 25 BN254 host functions: bn254.g1_add, bn254.g1_mul, bn254.pairing_check
note: Live proof. Generate in the browser via snarkjs, verify on-chain via Protocol 25 BN254 pairing check on the tier-verifier Soroban contract.
